name: lecc-daemon
description: Local Environment Command Center daemon for the LECC browser extension.

scripts.syntax: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/router.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/protocol.js && node --check src/handlers/logs.js && node --check src/handlers/cache.js && node --check src/handlers/permissions.js && node --check src/handlers/processes.js && node --check src/handlers/port-map.js && node --check extension/background/service-worker.js && node --check extension/popup/popup.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run syntax && npm test
